# Jane Okoye

Jane Okoye is the Head of Sustainability at Acme Corp and the primary executive sponsor for the carbon baseline engagement. She owns the board reporting timeline, coordinates with the CFO on disclosure language, and is the main escalation point when data collection stalls. Jane has a background in environmental engineering and is comfortable reviewing GHG accounting methodology decisions directly.

As the engagement's strongest internal champion, Jane reports to COO Reema Sharma and spends significant political capital bringing CFO Victor Lin around on the cost of credible baselining. She leans on data lead Omar Haddad to give Victor the numbers he trusts.
